---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for the project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

Please describe the problem or limitation that this feature would solve.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution or feature you would like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Expected Benefits

Explain how this feature would improve the Swahilipot Foundation Portal.

## Additional Context

Add any other information, screenshots, mockups, or examples that may help explain the request.
